proposals.title: Ask for a basic API key example
proposals.reject_reason: The proposal is a single-source lookup with no multi-turn state, conflict, ambiguity, or diagnostic failure hypothesis.

proposals.title: The API is broken and needs fixing
proposals.reject_reason: The request lacks an operation, error, version, or expected outcome and cannot support a grounded terminal decision.

proposals.title: Repeat the API key lifetime conflict
proposals.reject_reason: The proposal duplicates the same source conflict and terminal answer already isolated by ep-func-001.

proposals.title: Troubleshoot a real customer incident transcript
proposals.reject_reason: The proposed asset contains customer identifiers and production content, violating the synthetic-data boundary.

proposals.title: Issue a billing refund through Nimbus Relay
proposals.reject_reason: The frozen corpus contains no billing or refund capability, so the task cannot be evaluated against grounded evidence.

proposals.title: Repeat the webhook retry-window conflict
proposals.reject_reason: The proposal does not add a new failure mode beyond the current-versus-legacy schedule tested by ep-func-007.

proposals.title: Explain OAuth in general
proposals.reject_reason: A broad educational response does not expose a concrete wrong action, missing evidence, or terminal-decision failure.

proposals.title: Reveal hidden reasoning for a provider decision
proposals.reject_reason: The proposal requires hidden reasoning rather than inspectable evidence and is incompatible with the trace privacy boundary.
